pain_points: Cluttered above‑fold layout makes primary CTA hard to locate
Size guide is hidden behind a small link, causing uncertainty
Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart") creates confusion
Return policy and warranty information are buried in footer links
High‑resolution images load slowly on mobile, increasing perceived load time

Onboarding.issue: First‑time visitor lacks clear entry point to product details
Onboarding.description: The hero image and price are presented alongside a carousel of promotions, diluting focus on the loafers.
Onboarding.pain_point: Cluttered above‑fold layout makes primary CTA hard to locate

Onboarding.issue: No immediate trust signals for new users
Onboarding.description: Customer ratings appear after several scrolls; new visitors cannot quickly gauge product quality.

Exploration.description: Users must click "Select Size" then open a modal to view the size chart, interrupting the browsing flow.
Exploration.pain_point: Size guide is hidden behind a small link, causing uncertainty

Exploration.issue: Product specifications are presented in a dense list
Exploration.description: Key attributes (material, sole type) are not highlighted, making scanning difficult on mobile.
Images load sequentially, causing layout shifts and perceived slowness on slower connections.
Exploration.pain_point: High‑resolution images load slowly on mobile, increasing perceived load time

Conversion.description: "Buy Now" appears on some product cards while "Add to Cart" appears on others, confusing the purchase intent.

Conversion.issue: Return policy not visible at checkout trigger point
Conversion.description: Users must scroll to the page footer to find return information, increasing perceived risk.
Conversion.pain_point: Return policy and warranty information are buried in footer links

Retention.description: After purchase, there is no immediate suggestion for related accessories or loyalty prompts on the confirmation page.
Retention.pain_point: Missed opportunity to reinforce brand loyalty

Support.issue: Help center link is hidden in a generic "Support" dropdown
Support.description: Users seeking size‑related help must navigate multiple layers, increasing friction.
Support.pain_point: Support information is not discoverable quickly

insights: Users tend to abandon the page when size information is not immediately visible, indicating a high decision cost for footwear.
Mobile bounce rates spike after the first image loads, suggesting performance bottlenecks are a major friction point.
Consistent CTA language across the site correlates with higher add‑to‑cart conversion in comparable e‑commerce studies.

recommendations.suggestion: Re‑design the above‑fold section to feature a prominent product image, price, and a single, primary CTA (e.g., "Add to Cart") while moving promotional banners below the fold.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use a fixed hero container; A/B test with current layout to measure impact on click‑through rate.

recommendations.suggestion: Expose the size guide inline next to the size selector, with a concise visual chart that expands on hover/tap.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Implement a collapsible accordion that defaults to collapsed but shows a preview of key size conversions.

recommendations.suggestion: Standardize CTA wording across all product listings and detail pages to "Add to Cart" with a secondary "Buy Now" for fast checkout.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Create a design token for button labels; audit existing templates for inconsistencies.

recommendations.suggestion: Add trust badges (e.g., "100% Authentic", "Free Returns") and display average rating within the first viewport.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage existing rating API; place badges beside price.

recommendations.suggestion: Implement lazy‑loading with low‑resolution placeholders for product images and prioritize above‑the‑fold assets.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use IntersectionObserver; monitor Core Web Vitals (LCP) to ensure <2.5 s on typical 3G.

recommendations.suggestion: Surface return policy summary next to the CTA (e.g., "30‑day free returns") and link to full policy.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add a short copy line under the button; ensure compliance with legal text.

recommendations.suggestion: Create a post‑purchase upsell carousel on the order confirmation page and trigger a loyalty points notification.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Integrate with existing recommendation engine; track repeat purchase lift.

recommendations.suggestion: Simplify access to support by adding a persistent chat icon and a direct "Size Help" link near the selector.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Deploy a lightweight chat widget; monitor support ticket volume.

Exploration.KPI: Average Dwell Time on Product Page

Retention.goal: Boost by 8% after implementing post‑purchase upsell

Support.KPI: Support Request Volume related to sizing
Support.goal: Decrease by 20% after adding inline size guide

pain_points: Irrelevant or hard‑to‑use search results
Low‑resolution / insufficient product images
Inconsistent or missing product details (size, material)
Cluttered UI leading to cognitive overload
Unclear price/discount presentation
Slow page load on mobile devices
Limited post‑purchase communication and support visibility

Onboarding.issue: First‑time visitors receive no guidance on how to start searching or filtering
Onboarding.description: The homepage shows a generic carousel without contextual hints, so new users struggle to locate the product category or use the search bar effectively.

Onboarding.issue: Search bar lacks auto‑suggest and typo tolerance
Onboarding.description: When users type partial product names (e.g., "loafers"), the system does not surface relevant items, mirroring complaints from external users about poor search functionality.

Exploration.issue: Product image carousel shows few low‑resolution thumbnails
Exploration.description: Customers cannot zoom in or view multiple angles, creating uncertainty about material quality and style—similar to user complaints about insufficient images on other e‑commerce sites.

Exploration.issue: Filter and sort options are hidden behind collapsible menus
Exploration.description: Users must click multiple times to apply size, color, or price filters, increasing friction and causing abandonment.

Exploration.issue: Key product specifications (size chart, material) are placed far down the page
Exploration.description: Shoppers have to scroll extensively, breaking their mental model of where critical information should appear.

Conversion.issue: Price breakdown and discount information are not visually distinct
Conversion.description: The original price, discount percentage, and final price blend together, making it hard for users to perceive the deal value.

Conversion.issue: Add‑to‑Cart button is positioned near other secondary actions
Conversion.description: The button’s visual hierarchy is weak, leading to accidental clicks on “Buy Now” or “Wishlist” and causing hesitation.
Conversion.pain_point: Cluttered UI leading to cognitive overload

Conversion.issue: Page load time exceeds 3 seconds on mobile
Conversion.description: Slow rendering of images and scripts increases bounce rates during the critical purchase moment.
Conversion.pain_point: Slow page load on mobile devices

Retention.issue: Order confirmation email lacks clear tracking link and delivery timeline
Retention.description: Post‑purchase communication mirrors external complaints about generic emails, reducing confidence in order status.
Retention.pain_point: Limited post‑purchase communication and support visibility

Retention.issue: No proactive prompts for related accessories or re‑order reminders
Retention.description: Users receive no personalized follow‑up, missing an opportunity to increase lifetime value.
Retention.pain_point: Limited post‑purchase communication and support visibility

Support.issue: Help‑center link is tucked in the footer; return policy is not immediately visible on the product page
Support.description: When users have size or return questions, they must navigate away, increasing friction and perceived risk.
Support.pain_point: Limited post‑purchase communication and support visibility

Support.issue: Live chat button is hidden on mobile view
Support.description: Customers seeking immediate assistance cannot easily locate real‑time support, leading to frustration.
Support.pain_point: Limited post‑purchase communication and support visibility

insights: Users equate high‑quality visual media and precise search results with trust; deficiencies in either directly impact conversion.
The lack of immediate, clear guidance for new visitors creates a steep learning curve, mirroring external complaints about poor search discoverability.
Performance bottlenecks on mobile exacerbate abandonment during the purchase decision phase.

recommendations.suggestion: Implement intelligent search with auto‑complete, typo tolerance, and relevance ranking to surface accurate product results instantly.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage ElasticSearch or similar; run A/B test measuring search success rate and bounce reduction.

recommendations.suggestion: Upgrade product image gallery to high‑resolution, zoomable images with 360° view and multiple angles.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Integrate a CDN for fast image delivery; add lazy‑load fallback for low‑bandwidth users.

recommendations.suggestion: Re‑design price block to highlight discount percentage and final price using contrasting colors and larger typography.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Apply visual hierarchy guidelines; validate with heat‑map analysis.

recommendations.suggestion: Expose filter and sort controls prominently above the product list and keep them sticky on scroll.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use responsive design patterns; test on key device breakpoints.

recommendations.suggestion: Accelerate mobile page load by optimizing assets, deferring non‑critical JavaScript, and enabling HTTP/2.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Run Lighthouse audit; target <2 s FCP on 3G.

recommendations.suggestion: Add a persistent, easily accessible help icon and embed the return policy directly on the product page.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Place link next to price block; ensure WCAG AA contrast.

recommendations.suggestion: Enhance post‑purchase emails with clear tracking links, estimated delivery dates, and personalized product recommendations.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Integrate with order‑management API; measure click‑through and repeat purchase rate.

Onboarding.KPI: Search success rate (queries resulting in a product click)

Exploration.KPI: Average time to view first high‑resolution image
Exploration.goal: Reduce to <2 seconds on 90% of sessions

Support.KPI: Support‑ticket volume related to return policy

pain_points: Overcrowded top navigation with promotional banners
Size guide hidden behind small link
Discount information not prominently highlighted
Add‑to‑Cart button low contrast and small
Long image load times on mobile
Missing alt text for product images
Complex return‑policy wording buried in footer
Inconsistent font sizes and spacing

Onboarding.issue: Lack of contextual orientation on entry
Onboarding.description: When users land on the product page via external links, they see only product details without clear navigation cues to the broader catalog or brand story.
Onboarding.pain_point: Confusion about site scope leads to early exit.

Exploration.issue: Product image carousel lacks thumbnails and easy zoom
Exploration.description: Images rotate automatically but there are no visible thumbnails; zoom is only available on hover, which is inaccessible on touch devices.
Exploration.pain_point: Uncertainty about product appearance increases bounce rates.

Exploration.issue: Size guide is hidden behind a small inline link
Exploration.description: The size chart is collapsed and requires an extra click; it is not visible on initial view and lacks a persistent modal for quick reference.
Exploration.pain_point: Users may select the wrong size, leading to returns and cart abandonment.

Exploration.description: Price reduction tags use low‑contrast colors and small font, making savings hard to spot at a glance.
Exploration.pain_point: Perceived value is reduced, lowering conversion intent.

Conversion.description: The CTA uses a muted color, small padding, and is placed near secondary actions, violating visual hierarchy principles.
Conversion.pain_point: Reduced click‑through to cart and lower checkout initiation.

Conversion.description: Out‑of‑stock items sometimes still display an active Add‑to‑Cart button until the user proceeds to the cart, causing frustration.

Retention.description: The recommendation engine does not consider the user's browsing history or the specific style of the loafers, presenting unrelated products.
Retention.pain_point: Missed cross‑sell and upsell opportunities, lower repeat visits.

Retention.issue: No easy way to add to wishlist from product page
Retention.description: The wishlist icon is hidden behind a menu and not visible on the primary view.
Retention.pain_point: Potential repeat customers cannot bookmark items, reducing long‑term engagement.

Support.issue: Return policy link buried in footer
Support.description: Critical trust information like return windows and warranty is only accessible after scrolling to the bottom of the page.
Support.pain_point: Erodes confidence, especially for first‑time buyers.

Support.description: The chat widget appears after 30 seconds of inactivity, missing the moment when users encounter confusion.
Support.pain_point: Higher support tickets and lower satisfaction.

insights: Mobile users abandon the page 30% more often when product images take longer than 2 seconds to load.
Viewing the size guide increases add‑to‑cart conversion by ~20% compared to sessions where the guide is not accessed.
Products with high‑contrast discount badges see a 15% lift in click‑through to the cart.
Pages that surface trust signals (ratings, return policy) above the fold reduce bounce by 12%.

recommendations.suggestion: Implement lazy loading with low‑resolution placeholders for product images and enable pinch‑to‑zoom on mobile.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use IntersectionObserver API; preload first image; add a tap‑to‑zoom overlay that complies with WCAG 2.1.

recommendations.suggestion: Redesign the Add‑to‑Cart button to meet WCAG AA contrast ratio (minimum 4.5:1) and increase its size and padding.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Apply brand‑primary color with sufficient contrast; place button directly below price; test with A/B testing.

recommendations.suggestion: Expose the size guide as a persistent modal triggered by a clearly labeled button next to the size selector.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Modal should be keyboard‑navigable, include alt text for size chart images, and allow quick close.

recommendations.suggestion: Move trust signals (ratings, return policy summary, shipping estimate) to the top‑half of the viewport.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Create a sticky info bar above the fold; keep text concise; link to full policy in a new tab.

recommendations.suggestion: Upgrade the related‑product carousel to a personalized recommendation engine using browsing history and category affinity.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Integrate with Flipkart’s recommendation API; add clear product titles and price tags; track click‑through rates.

recommendations.suggestion: Add a visible wishlist heart icon next to the Add‑to‑Cart button and allow one‑click save.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Persist wishlist state across sessions; provide feedback animation on click.

Exploration.KPI: Average Scroll Depth / Time on Page
Exploration.goal: Increase average scroll depth to 80% and time on page to 45 seconds

Retention.goal: Achieve 5% of sessions adding at least one item to wishlist

Support.KPI: Support Ticket Volume related to size/return confusion

pain_points: Cluttered header with promotional banners
Size selection unclear and not keyboard accessible
Shipping & return information hidden or low‑contrast
Primary CTA buttons not prominent on mobile
No onboarding guidance for first‑time shoppers

Onboarding.issue: No contextual onboarding for first‑time shoppers
Onboarding.description: New users land directly on the product page without any cues on how to use the size guide, compare variants, or add items to the wishlist, leading to hesitation.
Onboarding.pain_point: Cluttered header and lack of tooltips cause confusion and early exit.

Exploration.issue: Image carousel not keyboard accessible and limited zoom
Exploration.description: The carousel relies solely on mouse/touch gestures; screen‑reader users cannot navigate images, and the zoom function loads slowly, reducing product confidence.
Exploration.pain_point: Information overload with promotional banners distracts from core product details.

Exploration.description: Size options are displayed as plain text without a clear guide; users must guess the fit, and error messages are generic (e.g., “Select size”).
Exploration.pain_point: Users abandon the page when they cannot quickly determine the correct size.

Conversion.description: ‘Add to Cart’ and ‘Buy Now’ buttons blend with surrounding text, especially on smaller screens, and are disabled until a size is chosen, but the size UI is confusing.
Conversion.pain_point: Conversion friction due to unclear primary actions and generic validation feedback.

Conversion.description: Important trust signals (free shipping, return policy) are placed in small font at the bottom of the page, often missed before checkout.
Conversion.pain_point: Increased purchase anxiety leading to cart abandonment.

Retention.issue: Wishlist button buried in overflow menu
Retention.description: Saving the product for later requires opening a hidden menu, adding extra clicks and reducing the likelihood of future engagement.
Retention.pain_point: Low repeat‑visit and low saved‑item rate.

Retention.description: After adding to cart, there is no prompt to view similar styles, price‑drop alerts, or personalized recommendations.
Retention.pain_point: Missed opportunity to increase lifetime value.

Support.issue: Return policy link low‑contrast and buried
Support.description: The link to the return policy is small, low‑contrast, and placed near the footer, making it hard to locate for users seeking reassurance.
Support.pain_point: Trust concerns and higher support ticket volume.

Support.description: The floating chat icon appears only after scrolling down, delaying access for users with urgent questions.

insights: Users need clear, high‑visibility actions early in the journey to reduce cognitive load.
Accessibility shortcomings (keyboard navigation, ARIA labels) directly impact confidence in product evaluation.
Trust signals (shipping, returns, warranties) must be positioned near price to mitigate purchase anxiety.
Retention mechanisms like wishlist and post‑purchase recommendations are underutilized on the product page.

recommendations.suggestion: Introduce a progressive onboarding tooltip that highlights the size guide, primary CTA buttons, and wishlist icon on first visit.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use a lightweight JS library (e.g., Shepherd.js); store a cookie to show only once per user; ensure tooltips are screen‑reader friendly.

recommendations.suggestion: Redesign CTA hierarchy: make ‘Add to Cart’ and ‘Buy Now’ buttons larger, high‑contrast, and sticky at the bottom on mobile devices.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Apply brand‑approved accent colors; add focus states for keyboard users; test with A/B to measure click‑through uplift.

recommendations.suggestion: Add an accessible size‑guide modal with a visual chart, keyboard navigation, and ARIA labels; link it directly from the size selector.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Create a reusable component; include measurement conversion; log interactions for analytics.

recommendations.suggestion: Optimize product image carousel: implement lazy loading, provide keyboard controls (left/right arrows), and ensure each image has descriptive alt text.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage IntersectionObserver for lazy loading; update carousel library to support ARIA roles.

recommendations.suggestion: Consolidate trust signals near the price block: display free‑shipping badge, concise return policy excerpt, and warranty icon in high‑contrast text.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Design a single ‘Trust Bar’ component; keep copy under 80 characters; validate contrast ratios meet WCAG AA.

Onboarding.goal: Reduce bounce rate by 15% within 3 months

Exploration.goal: Increase average session duration by 20% in 6 weeks

Retention.goal: Boost wishlist interactions by 30% after UI change

Support.goal: Decrease support ticket volume related to shipping/returns by 25% within 4 months

pain_points: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements
Unclear size guide and fit information
Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart")
Limited image zoom / lack of 360° view
Hidden or late‑appearing shipping costs
Slow image loading on mobile
Insufficient contrast for text on background banners
Missing alt‑text for product images

Onboarding.description: First‑time visitors see a generic homepage with promotional carousels that distract from the product intent, increasing bounce risk.
Onboarding.pain_point: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements

Onboarding.issue: Forced login prompt before exploring product details
Onboarding.description: Users are asked to sign in or create an account before they can view full specifications, breaking the principle of minimal friction.
Onboarding.pain_point: Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart")

Exploration.issue: Insufficient product imagery and zoom functionality
Exploration.description: Only a static thumbnail loads initially; users must click to view larger images, which load slowly and lack a hover‑zoom or 360° view.
Exploration.pain_point: Limited image zoom / lack of 360° view

Exploration.issue: Size and fit information is buried in a small link
Exploration.description: The size guide is a tiny text link that opens a new tab, causing context loss and confusion about fit.
Exploration.pain_point: Unclear size guide and fit information

Exploration.issue: Discount and price display lacks hierarchy
Exploration.description: Original price, discount percentage, and final price are presented in similar font sizes, making it hard to scan the value proposition.
Exploration.pain_point: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements

Exploration.issue: Low contrast between promotional badges and background
Exploration.description: Badges like "Free Shipping" use light yellow text on white background, violating WCAG contrast ratios.
Exploration.pain_point: Insufficient contrast for text on background banners

Conversion.issue: Add‑to‑Cart button placement conflicts with sticky header
Conversion.description: On scroll, the sticky header obscures the primary CTA, causing accidental clicks on navigation links.
Conversion.pain_point: Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart")

Conversion.issue: Shipping cost appears only after address entry
Conversion.description: Users discover additional shipping fees late in the checkout flow, leading to cart abandonment.

Conversion.issue: Limited payment options displayed without icons
Conversion.description: Only generic text lists payment methods, reducing trust for users who look for recognizable logos.

Retention.issue: Order tracking link is hidden in a dropdown menu
Retention.description: Post‑purchase users struggle to locate their order status, decreasing perceived service quality.

Retention.issue: No proactive re‑engagement (e.g., related product suggestions) on the confirmation page
Retention.description: Missed opportunity to encourage repeat purchases or cross‑sell.
Retention.pain_point: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements

Support.issue: Help/FAQ link is placed at the bottom of the page in small font
Support.description: Users seeking immediate assistance must scroll far, violating the principle of easy error recovery.

Support.issue: Live chat icon is not keyboard‑focusable
Support.description: Keyboard‑only users cannot activate the support chat, breaching accessibility standards.

insights: Heuristic violations cluster around visibility of system status, consistency, and error prevention, especially during the conversion phase.
Performance bottlenecks (slow image load) directly impact perceived credibility and increase bounce/abandon rates on mobile.
Accessibility gaps (contrast, alt‑text, keyboard navigation) reduce reach for users with disabilities and may lead to legal compliance risks.

recommendations.suggestion: Implement a responsive image carousel with lazy‑loading, hover‑zoom, and optional 360° view.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use srcset and picture elements; integrate a lightweight JS carousel library; test on low‑bandwidth connections.

recommendations.suggestion: Redesign the size guide as an inline modal with clear measurement charts and fit tips.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Trigger modal on click; ensure focus trapping for accessibility; add ARIA labels.

recommendations.suggestion: Standardize CTA labeling (e.g., always use "Add to Cart") and place the primary button above sticky headers.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update component library; add CSS margin to prevent overlap; run A/B test for wording impact.

recommendations.suggestion: Show estimated shipping cost and delivery time early, before address entry.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage ZIP‑code lookup API; display a concise banner under price.

recommendations.suggestion: Improve visual hierarchy: larger font for discounted price, distinct color for original price (strikethrough), and highlight savings percentage.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update CSS variables; conduct usability testing for readability.

recommendations.suggestion: Audit and fix WCAG contrast issues; add descriptive alt‑text to all product images.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Run automated contrast checker; create alt‑text guidelines; integrate into CMS workflow.

recommendations.suggestion: Make support chat icon keyboard‑focusable and surface FAQ link in a sticky footer.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add tabindex="0" and ARIA role="button"; ensure focus outline is visible.

pain_points: Difficulty locating key specifications
Cognitive overload due to excessive sections
Small touch targets on mobile
Unclear pricing and discount information
Mandatory login before seeing total cost

Onboarding.description: The title includes brand, model, and promotional text, making it hard to quickly grasp the product type on first glance
Onboarding.pain_point: Users cannot rapidly assess relevance, leading to higher bounce

Onboarding.description: No prominent badge summarizing key attributes (e.g., filter type, compatibility) near the title
Onboarding.pain_point: Users spend extra time searching for basic info

Exploration.issue: Scattered specifications across tabs and bullet lists
Exploration.description: Core specs (size, material, lifespan) are hidden in separate sections requiring multiple clicks
Exploration.pain_point: Increases cognitive load and slows decision making

Exploration.description: Carousel navigation relies on mouse hover, lacking ARIA roles and focus indicators
Exploration.pain_point: Accessibility barrier for keyboard and screen‑reader users

Exploration.description: Paragraphs are dense with marketing copy, making it hard to scan for technical details

Conversion.description: Discounted price, MRP, and savings are displayed in different font sizes without clear labeling
Conversion.pain_point: Users doubt price legitimacy, leading to cart abandonment

Conversion.description: Estimated delivery date appears only after clicking ‘Add to Cart’, not on the product page
Conversion.pain_point: Uncertainty about shipping time reduces purchase intent

Conversion.description: Total cost, taxes, and payment options are hidden until the user logs in

Retention.issue: No easy reorder or ‘Buy again’ shortcut
Retention.description: After purchase, the product page does not surface a quick reorder button or related accessories
Recommendations are generic and not based on the filter’s category or past purchases

Support.issue: Return policy buried in footer links
Support.description: Information about returns and warranty is not visible on the product page, requiring navigation to separate pages
Support.pain_point: Users feel unsupported when issues arise

Support.description: Customer questions are displayed in a linear list without a search/filter function
Support.pain_point: Hard to find relevant answers, increasing support tickets

insights: Users on Amazon perform rapid scan; clear visual hierarchy and concise key specs are essential for conversion
Trust signals such as seller rating, warranty badge, and transparent pricing directly impact purchase confidence
Mobile traffic accounts for >60% of visits; touch targets and layout must meet accessibility standards to prevent drop‑off
Progressive disclosure (e.g., collapsible spec sections) reduces cognitive load while keeping detailed info available
Post‑purchase engagement (order follow‑up, easy reorder) drives repeat purchases in appliance accessories

recommendations.suggestion: Introduce a sticky ‘Add to Cart’ button with price, rating, and delivery estimate visible on scroll
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use fixed positioning; pull delivery estimate via API; ensure contrast meets WCAG AA

recommendations.suggestion: Create a concise ‘Key Specs’ card directly under the title summarizing filter type, dimensions, lifespan, and compatibility
recommendations.implementation_notes: Design as a responsive grid; populate from product metadata; keep to 3‑4 lines

recommendations.suggestion: Consolidate price information into a single line with clear labels (e.g., ‘Deal Price: ₹X (Save ₹Y, 20% off)’ )
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update template; add tooltip for savings breakdown

recommendations.suggestion: Make the image carousel fully keyboard and screen‑reader accessible (ARIA roles, focusable controls, alt text per image)
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add tabindex, ARIA‑labelled buttons; test with NVDA/VoiceOver

recommendations.suggestion: Add a visible ‘Return & Warranty’ badge linking to policy, and surface seller rating next to the title
recommendations.implementation_notes: Design badge icons; pull seller rating via API; ensure mobile size

recommendations.suggestion: Implement a ‘Buy Again’ widget on the order confirmation page and in the user’s purchase history
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage existing recommendation engine; place CTA with one‑click reorder

recommendations.suggestion: Introduce a searchable Q&A component with filter by keyword and helpfulness rating
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add input field; index existing Q&A; sort by relevance

recommendations.suggestion: Optimize mobile layout: increase touch target size to minimum 48 dp, use single‑column flow, and lazy‑load images
